Registry / Terms / checking facility

checking facility

—Not in VIM/VIML G 18 #01653 · 30 instances

Suggested actions

  1. HIGH No authoritative definition in VIM or VIML.
  2. MEDIUM 24 distinct definitions — harmonise.

Publication instances

24 distinct definitions across 30 publications. 2 definitions are shared by multiple publications (merge candidates).
